channel.title: Ted-Talk on MarkJacobsen.net
channel.description: Recent content in Ted-Talk on MarkJacobsen.net

item.title: What’s it like to be a robot?
item.description:
Super interesting talk on how to adapt tech using robotics and the consequences of little design choices.

Please remember to subscribe to the newsletter or feed to stay up to date!

Disclaimer: Thoughts and opinions are my own, and do not reflect the views of any employer, family member, friend, or anyone else. Some links may be affiliate links, but I don’t link to anything I don’t use myself.

item.title: The world organized by income
item.description:
Ever forget how fortunate you are? How, to use Warren Buffet’s term, you won the “ovarian lottery”? Watch this and check out the site (dollarstreet.org).

Please remember to subscribe to the newsletter or feed to stay up to date!

Disclaimer: Thoughts and opinions are my own, and do not reflect the views of any employer, family member, friend, or anyone else. Some links may be affiliate links, but I don’t link to anything I don’t use myself.

item.title: A Funny Look at the Unintended Consequences of Technology
item.description:
Funny and scary at the same time…

Please remember to subscribe to the newsletter or feed to stay up to date!

Disclaimer: Thoughts and opinions are my own, and do not reflect the views of any employer, family member, friend, or anyone else. Some links may be affiliate links, but I don’t link to anything I don’t use myself.

item.title: Free yourself from your filter bubbles
item.description:
It probably wouldn’t hurt if we all freed ourselves from our own little filter bubble. That said, telling others their in a bubble or ridiculing them is probably not the best way to get a health dialog going. FWIW: I’m always open to a good conversation and sharing of ideas.

Free yourself from your filter bubblesPlease remember to subscribe to the newsletter or feed to stay up to date!

Disclaimer: Thoughts and opinions are my own, and do not reflect the views of any employer, family member, friend, or anyone else. Some links may be affiliate links, but I don’t link to anything I don’t use myself.

item.title: What intelligent machines can learn from a school of fish

What intelligent machines can learn from a school of fish
